scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const files = ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock']; for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) { try { fs.unlinkSync(files[i]); } catch (e) {} } const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!/^pnpm\//.test(ua)) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
